description:
A simple score counting app
Used for counting scores during head‑to‑head games between two teams or participants.

scorecounter is perfect for parents who want to record a child's football match score.

* No ads
* No tracking
* 100% free (as in freedom) software
* Doesn't require network access or additional permissions

When a team or participant scores, tap their corresponding red or blue button.

You can assign custom names to teams or participants.
